Records.authors: Spiering, Anne, Wilhelm, Matthias, Zhang, Chi
Records.description: The general planar dual-conformally invariant four-dimensional pentabox tensor integral with numerator (N,X_0) (N orthogonal to all X_l, l in L), in massless N=4 SYM. Decomposed into three six-dimensional scalar pentaboxes with one doubled propagator (eq: pb_reduction), each related by (1+partial_L) to an eight-dimensional heptagon (eq:pbDE) and further reduced to six-dimensional hexagons. Yields a one-fold integral representation containing four elliptic curves corresponding to its four double-box subtopologies; symbol determined here.
